items.title: Zaxcom Publishes White Paper on Narrow Band Direct Conversion – New Receiver Architecture Promises Better Interference Rejection
items.summary: Zaxcom has published a white paper detailing Narrow Band Direct Conversion, a new receiver architecture the company has been developing since 2023. The technology filters incoming RF through a 200kHz…

items.title: Photographer Sues Coffee Shop for Using Cartoon Version of Her Image on Cups
items.summary: A photographer has filed a lawsuit against a coffee shop for allegedly using a cartoon version of her image of a protester on its cups and bags without consent. [Read More]

items.title: Companies Selling DJI Products in Disguise Facing FCC Ban
items.summary: The Federal Communications Commission (FCC) is seeking to ban products made by companies it suspects of passing off DJI devices as another brand. [Read More]

items.title: A24 Defends Its $75M Google DeepMind AI Deal After Fan Backlash
items.summary: A24’s $75 million research partnership with Google DeepMind has now played out its full first act: the announcement, a revolt from the studio’s own fanbase, and an official defense built around wantin…
